title: The Island’s Secrets Push Forward
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy, Unknown person #9, Usopp, Nami as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
